mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_work_task ( task_no, task_type, warehouse_id, inbound_order_id, model_id, motorcycle_id, vin, target_bin_id, task_status, priority, dr, create_by, update_by ) VALUES ( #{taskNo}, #{taskType}, #{warehouseId}, #{inboundOrderId}, #{modelId}, #{motorcycleId}, #{vin}, #{targetBinId}, #{taskStatus}, #{priority}, 0, #{createBy}, #{updateBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_work_task SET task_status = 2, start_time = NOW(), assigned_user_id = CASE WHEN assigned_user_id IS NULL THEN #{operatorId} ELSE assigned_user_id END, last_operator_id = #{operatorId} WHERE id = #{taskId} AND dr = 0 AND task_status IN (0,1)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_task_checkpoint ( task_id, checkpoint_type, scan_content, expected_content, verify_result, operator_id, device_id, location_info, scan_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{checkpointType}, #{scanContent}, #{expectedContent}, #{verifyResult}, #{operatorId}, #{deviceId}, #{locationInfo}, #{scanTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_work_task SET task_status = 3, complete_time = NOW(), last_operator_id = #{operatorId} WHERE id = #{taskId} AND dr = 0 AND task_status = 2
UPDATE wms_work_task SET task_status = 4, abandon_reason = #{reason}, abandon_time = #{abandonTime}, last_operator_id = #{operatorId} WHERE id = #{taskId} AND dr = 0 AND task_status IN (0,1,2)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_inventory ( warehouse_id, model_id, bin_id, motorcycle_id, quantity, frozen_quantity, available_quantity, last_inbound_time, version, create_by, update_by ) VALUES ( #{warehouseId}, #{modelId}, #{binId}, #{motorcycleId}, #{quantity}, 0, #{quantity}, #{inboundTime}, 0, #{operator}, #{operator} )

INSERT INTO wms_inventory_movement ( warehouse_id, model_id, motorcycle_id, vin, movement_type, quantity_change, before_quantity, after_quantity, source_bin_id, target_bin_id, task_id, order_no, operator_id, operator_name, movement_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{warehouseId}, #{modelId}, #{motorcycleId}, #{vin}, 1, #{afterQuantity} - #{beforeQuantity}, #{beforeQuantity}, #{afterQuantity}, NULL, #{targetBinId}, #{taskId}, #{orderNo}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{movementTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_inbound_order SET order_status = CASE WHEN actual_quantity >= total_quantity THEN 3 WHEN actual_quantity > 0 THEN 2 ELSE order_status END, update_by = #{operator} WHERE id = #{orderId} AND dr = 0
